content: agent2: implementing key_transform param for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (do_groupby function). Will touch that function only.

Applied via list comprehension after building _GroupTuple list: 'if key_transform is not None: out = [_GroupTuple(key_transform(key), values) for key, values in out]'.
